name: learning
description: Daily educational digests and weekly workshops, calibrated by interactive feedback to match your learning style and depth.
standalone_features: Daily morning digest (8am ET) — educational recap of yesterday's work
Weekly Sunday workshop — hands-on tutorial from the week's activity
Per-section feedback reactions that shape a learning profile over time
Telegram notification when new digests are ready
Hub view with digest archive, inline reading, and feedback buttons

features: Research findings woven into daily/weekly digests
enhancements.description: Incorporates research tasks and wiki updates into learning content.

features: Health summary included in daily digest
enhancements.description: Yesterday's platform health status as a digest section.
